Support
Product support included
What's Product Support?
In the event your product doesn't work as expected or you need help using it, Amazon offers free product support options such as live phone/chat with an Amazon associate, manufacturer contact information, step-by-step troubleshooting guides, and help videos. By solving product issues, we help the planet by extending the life of products. Availability of support options differ by product and country. Learn more
Payment
Secure transaction
Your transaction is secure
We work hard to protect your security and privacy. Our payment security system encrypts your information during transmission. We don’t share your credit card details with third-party sellers, and we don’t sell your information to others. Learn more

Available at checkout
Available at checkout This item is a gift. Change
At checkout, you can add a custom message, a gift receipt for easy returns and have the item gift-wrapped

      About this item

      • REDESIGNED WITH THE BEST SOUND IN MIND: Keep your Galaxy Buds3 Pro in with a design that delivers long-lasting comfort for an immersive listening experience
      • A SLEEK DESIGN MADE TO SHINE: Let your sound shine as much as you do with Buds3 Pro that light up¹
      • AUDIO THAT ADAPTS TO YOUR SURROUNDINGS: Immerse yourself while staying alert to your surroundings thanks to Adaptive Active Noise Cancellation with Galaxy AI²; Your Buds will automatically adapt to help you hear what matters²
      • AUDIO TAILORED TO BEST FIT YOU: Immerse yourself in the best listening experience, no matter how you wear your Galaxy Buds3 Pro; An Adaptive Equalizer for Sound Optimization with Galaxy AI allows you to get the most out of your audio²
      • EXCLUSIVE 2-YEAR WARRANTY: Includes a 2-year limited Samsung warranty (Amazon exclusive)⁵
      • SOUND THAT TRANSPORTS YOU: Your favorite content deserves our best and most immersive audio¹
      • THEY SAY “HOLA,” YOU HEAR “HELLO: Hear translations through your Galaxy Buds during face-to-face conversations using Real-Time Interpreter with Galaxy AI³
      • YOUR BEST BUDS FOR TRANSLATING CALLS: Hear translations through your Galaxy Buds while using the Samsung Phone app³
      • TOUCH CONTROLS WITH A PERSONAL TOUCH: Program your Galaxy Buds controls to do what you want — pause, skip, accept calls and more — with Intuitive Touch Control¹
      • DESIGNED FOR DURABILITY: Listen to your Galaxy Buds3 Pro with peace of mind wherever the day takes you thanks to a durable design⁴
      Show more

      Customer ReviewVery Comfortable, Noise Cancelling and Crystal Clear SoundSee Full Review

      Product Description

      Meet the new shape of sound — Galaxy Buds3 Pro — now completely redesigned with improved hardware to bring you deeper into the audio than ever before. With Galaxy AI¹, your Buds create the best listening experience by optimizing sound based on your surroundings and how you wear them — while providing a snug fit for all-day comfort, no matter what you do. Buds3 Pro get how much you love your audio. From jamming while cooking to listening to your favorite show on a crowded subway to taking a work call, your Buds will adjust to the different sounds around you using Adaptive Active Noise Cancellation so you always hear what’s important. Plus, they’re packed with features to create a convenient listening experience — from auto-switching⁴ your audio between your Galaxy phone and your Galaxy PC to immersing you in the latest TV shows with 360 Audio, now available on Samsung TVs. And it doesn’t stop there — Buds make perfect companions for your Galaxy phone as you travel. Real-Time Interpreter with Galaxy AI³ allows you to speak like a local as your phone translates speech right in your Buds so you never miss a word from your local tour guide. No matter what you listen to or how you listen, we’ve redesigned our Buds to give you the most immersive audio experience with Galaxy Buds3 Pro. ¹Requires a compatible Galaxy phone and One UI 4.0 or later with 1.5GB RAM or above. ²Requires initial set up via Samsung Wear app on compatible device. ³Requires compatible Galaxy device. Samsung account login and language preset (English and Spanish pre-installed; other languages require free download). Results may vary. ⁴IP-rated for submersion in up to 3 feet of fresh water for up to 30 minutes (charging case is not water-resistant). If the earbuds or your hands are wet, they must be dried thoroughly prior to handling. ⁵Available only on products sold by and shipped from Amazon.

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

      Customers say

      Customers find these earbuds to be solid with good sound quality and superb noise cancellation. The fit receives mixed feedback - while some say they fit snugly in their ears, others report they don't stay in place. Similarly, battery life, reliability, connectivity, and value for money show mixed results, with some praising the performance while others report issues.

      Amazon Customer
      5 out of 5 stars
      BEST Buds!
      heard about these amazing ear buds and felt they would make a great gift for my guy -- ended up getting myself a pair too! then I got awesome cases (his in blue, and mine in red) -- they are easy to charge, both wired and wireless charging works without needing to take off the case... we are both very pleased with the purchases! the grip is great, the case opens easily and closes securely -- buds fit perfectly! everything about the case feels durable and lasting which is important because the ear buds are as amazing as advertised and I want them to last despite our clumsy ways! In all seriousness, I am truly impressed.
      MoreHide

      Top reviews from the United States

      There was a problem filtering reviews. Please reload the page.

      • Valentine
        5.0 out of 5 stars perfect perfect perfect!!
        Reviewed in the United States on March 24, 2026
        Color: SilverStyle: Buds 3 ProPattern: Buds 3 Pro OnlyVerified Purchase
        This is the first time I can justify buying earbuds with a high price.

        As someone who’s constantly listening to music, I haven’t had them die on me. Id say the longest the case went without needing a charge was around 3-4 days?
        Of course depending on how much you use them this would vary just like any other device!

        But even without fully charging it doing a quick charge can go a long way.

        If you have a Samsung device the customization on these are incredible and very easy to navigate through, want more bass? You can do that! Want to have a more clear and higher quality audio? You can also have that!
        Noise cancellation and ambient modes, all of it easy to access together.

        And the volume on it is LOUD . Even if it’s half way which is great
        Calling on it sounds clear not muffled unlike other headphones.

        Also the case holds up well. My boyfriend’s dropped twice and although it’s scuffed they work just fine. Buuut I do highly recommend finding a protective case for it.

        Another thing to add is that it comes with extra buds to of course, cater to different ear size. my ears are very small and it’s super comfortable to wear without them falling out.

        There’s many other features I’ve yet to look at as well but trust me if you buy them you won’t be disappointed!!
        Read more

      • Frodadd
        5.0 out of 5 stars The current best option for modern ear buds.
        Reviewed in the United States on February 12, 2026
        Color: SilverStyle: Buds 3 ProPattern: Buds 3 Pro OnlyVerified Purchase
        I don't do ear buds. They will never stay in my ears. Seriously I don't understand how they stay in other people's ears. I'm a headphone elitist and collect them. Are they better than my Sennheisers, AKGs or Sony headphones? Nah, BUT I paired these with some around the ear bud holders and they serve me fantastically for meetings at work or on the go gaming/general phone use. The noise canceling was impressive for buds. The sound is also impressive. I still have no clue how the touch functions work as I never read the manual but that's on me and I don't care. It comes down to what you need them for. The small profile make them a great option for traveling, work or working out.
        Read more
        2 people found this helpful
        Helpful
         Report
      • Michael W. Jacobson
        5.0 out of 5 stars These are my best buds! (Get it?)
        Reviewed in the United States on November 4, 2025
        Color: SilverStyle: Buds 3 ProPattern: Buds 3 Pro OnlyVerified Purchase
        Wow, wow, WOW. My only regret in not purchasing the Buds 3 Pro for my Galaxy phone and tablet is that I didn't do it sooner.

        I've used a few different types of buds, from Echo Buds to highly rated Sony ones, and the Galaxy Buds really deliver for me the best of all worlds.

        First, sound. Wow! Most buds you can hear, and...that's about it. My Sony ones were terrific. But these offer perfect clarity, good bass response, and a real openness to the music (I'm a vinyl record fanatic, so I tend to grimace at the sound of streaming music through tiny buds...not here). Plus the amazing flexibility in sound control...you have many preset EQ setting to choose from, or you can do it manually to tweak how you like. There are even settings optimized for your age range, and an ability to go through a test of sounds for it to set up an optimal listening experience based on your results. I always test buds with "Get Lucky" by Daft Punk, and I was very impressed. Clear bass and midrange, and even a sense of space in the music!

        These also offer the best active noise cancelling I've yet heard with ear buds. None have been "dead silence" all around, but even leaving my house and standing under a noisy garage door opener, seemed only a few of the high frequencies barely skipped through. You can also opt for ambient sound, or an automatic switch, so they'll go from ANC to ambient if a siren approaches or someone speaks to you.

        Ear bud fit is always something that gives me "fits", and these come with other tips you can switch out for best sizing, but right out of the case, they were comfortable and felt like nothing was there. So much so I worried they might be too loose, but several vigorous head shakes later and they were secure, so I had both a sense of confidence in fit, as well as a little dizziness from head shaking.

        You can control the buds by the stems if you wish, and controls are customizable. A squeeze can answer a call or skip a song, and a simple slide with your finger up or down can control the volume.

        The case charges wirelessly or with USB. Like most bud cases, the center of gravity is too high so they tend to tip over when the lid is open. It seems to charge fast. I'm not much of an expert on battery life, but I know my Sony ones lost a lot of power quickly. I took a 20 minute walk with the Galaxy Buds fully charged, volume at a good clip, and music constantly playing, and when I got done, they were at 91%.

        I mainly decided to try these because the battery life in my Sony buds was getting a little troubling. I'm glad I did. I can't speak to how these will work for you if you don't have a Samsung ecosystem, but for me, the incredible sound, comfort, and ease of use and customization really make the Galaxy Buds stand out!
        Read more
        42 people found this helpful
        Helpful

      • Amazon Customer
        5.0 out of 5 stars Absolutely Worth Every Penny
        Reviewed in the United States on March 5, 2026
        Color: SilverStyle: Buds 3 ProPattern: Buds 3 Pro OnlyVerified Purchase
        I love these headphones. I had Razer Hammerhead TWS (2nd Gen) and these blow those out of the water.

        Sound quality is great. Easy connect and reconnects automatically with my tablet and phone. The battery absolutely smashes my old Razer. The fit is great. I went back and forth between the medium and large tips but settled on the mediums. They come with small as well.

        Ambient mode is great and is nice and clear and doesn't sound sound full of static. And ANC Mode works great as well.

        Hands down the best earbuds I've ever owned.

      About this Item

      • REDESIGNED WITH THE BEST SOUND IN MIND: Keep your Galaxy Buds3 Pro in with a design that delivers long-lasting comfort for an immersive listening experience
      • A SLEEK DESIGN MADE TO SHINE: Let your sound shine as much as you do with Buds3 Pro that light up¹
      • AUDIO THAT ADAPTS TO YOUR SURROUNDINGS: Immerse yourself while staying alert to your surroundings thanks to Adaptive Active Noise Cancellation with Galaxy AI²; Your Buds will automatically adapt to help you hear what matters²
      • AUDIO TAILORED TO BEST FIT YOU: Immerse yourself in the best listening experience, no matter how you wear your Galaxy Buds3 Pro; An Adaptive Equalizer for Sound Optimization with Galaxy AI allows you to get the most out of your audio²
      • EXCLUSIVE 2-YEAR WARRANTY: Includes a 2-year limited Samsung warranty (Amazon exclusive)⁵
      • SOUND THAT TRANSPORTS YOU: Your favorite content deserves our best and most immersive audio¹
      • THEY SAY “HOLA,” YOU HEAR “HELLO: Hear translations through your Galaxy Buds during face-to-face conversations using Real-Time Interpreter with Galaxy AI³
      • YOUR BEST BUDS FOR TRANSLATING CALLS: Hear translations through your Galaxy Buds while using the Samsung Phone app³
      • TOUCH CONTROLS WITH A PERSONAL TOUCH: Program your Galaxy Buds controls to do what you want — pause, skip, accept calls and more — with Intuitive Touch Control¹
      • DESIGNED FOR DURABILITY: Listen to your Galaxy Buds3 Pro with peace of mind wherever the day takes you thanks to a durable design⁴

      Product Description

      Meet the new shape of sound — Galaxy Buds3 Pro — now completely redesigned with improved hardware to bring you deeper into the audio than ever before. With Galaxy AI¹, your Buds create the best listening experience by optimizing sound based on your surroundings and how you wear them — while providing a snug fit for all-day comfort, no matter what you do. Buds3 Pro get how much you love your audio. From jamming while cooking to listening to your favorite show on a crowded subway to taking a work call, your Buds will adjust to the different sounds around you using Adaptive Active Noise Cancellation so you always hear what’s important. Plus, they’re packed with features to create a convenient listening experience — from auto-switching⁴ your audio between your Galaxy phone and your Galaxy PC to immersing you in the latest TV shows with 360 Audio, now available on Samsung TVs. And it doesn’t stop there — Buds make perfect companions for your Galaxy phone as you travel. Real-Time Interpreter with Galaxy AI³ allows you to speak like a local as your phone translates speech right in your Buds so you never miss a word from your local tour guide. No matter what you listen to or how you listen, we’ve redesigned our Buds to give you the most immersive audio experience with Galaxy Buds3 Pro. ¹Requires a compatible Galaxy phone and One UI 4.0 or later with 1.5GB RAM or above. ²Requires initial set up via Samsung Wear app on compatible device. ³Requires compatible Galaxy device. Samsung account login and language preset (English and Spanish pre-installed; other languages require free download). Results may vary. ⁴IP-rated for submersion in up to 3 feet of fresh water for up to 30 minutes (charging case is not water-resistant). If the earbuds or your hands are wet, they must be dried thoroughly prior to handling. ⁵Available only on products sold by and shipped from Amazon.

      Newer Version Available
